title: IntakeWorkflowContract
description: Input/output contract for the intake workflow stage. The stage receives raw operator input and produces a schema-valid ContentBrief.

input.description: Raw operator-supplied input to the intake stage.

raw_idea.description: Raw text idea submitted by the operator. The only required input.

requested_format.description: Content format requested by the operator. Null if not specified — intake stage must infer or mark unknown.

language.description: BCP-47 language code requested by the operator (e.g. en, uk, ru). Null if not specified.

constraints.description: Raw constraint strings provided by the operator (e.g. 'no music', 'under 60 seconds'). Null if not specified. The intake stage normalizes these into typed ContentBrief constraints.

output.description: Normalized ContentBrief produced by the intake stage. Must be schema-valid before being written to runs/artifacts/{run_id}/brief.json.
